semantic.role: Type contract definitions for prompt context budgets, diagnostics, and generation modes within the infrastructure layer.
responsibilities: Define the PromptBudgetProfile interface to cap header lines with base/min/max/divisor boundaries.
Define the PromptBudgets interface to aggregate budgets for header, source, rules, and diagnostics sections.
Define the SourcePromptArtifactsInput interface as the input contract for constructing prompt artifacts from raw data.
Define the SourcePromptArtifacts interface as the output contract for processed prompt artifacts.
Define the PromptContextDiagnostics interface to capture diagnostic snapshots from the prompt context engine.
Define the PromptRuleBlockDiagnostics interface to report rule block processing diagnostics.
Define the PromptRelevanceDiagnostics interface to measure and flag relevance scores.
Define the SourceFileDiagnosticsSnapshot interface to snapshot per-file diagnostic state.
Define the RelevanceDiagnosticsSnapshot interface to snapshot relevance metrics.
Export literal union types PromptTaskMode, ValidatePolicy, GenerationStrategy, and RelevanceDiagnosticsMode as configuration enums.
outOfScope: Runtime generation or manipulation of prompt content.
Execution of validation or summarization logic.
Direct file I/O or LLM API interactions.
Any business logic beyond type definitions.
invariants: All exports are pure TypeScript type definitions with no runtime side effects.
This module acts as a stable type facade within infra; external callers should import these types rather than reaching into deeper implementation modules.
Imported type references (FileSkeleton, ContextResolutionDiagnostics, etc.) are used only for type composition.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain a centralized type contract layer for prompt context configuration, diagnostics, and policies to decouple infrastructure logic from type definitions.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No specific recent change intent provided; the commit message 'chore: apply release gate fixes and sync accumulated source changes' suggests maintenance and synchronization of accumulated changes.

publicSurface.description: Defines line budget parameters (base, min, max, divisor) for structuring prompt headers.
Aggregates budget values for header, source, rules, and diagnostics sections controlling prompt generation.
Input type capturing raw file skeletons and context diagnostics needed to construct prompt artifacts.
Output type containing processed prompt artifacts ready for rendering.
Diagnostic snapshot of the prompt context process including rule blocks and relevance diagnostics.
Diagnostic information about rule block processing in the prompt context engine.
Metrics and flags for measuring file relevance in the prompt context.
Snapshot of diagnostic state for a single source file during prompt processing.
Snapshot of relevance diagnostic metrics aggregated from context analysis.
Literal union type 'summarize' | 'validate' controlling the prompt generation mode.
Literal union type 'default' | 'strict' for validation strictness level.
Literal union type 'together' | 'json-only' for output generation strategy.
Literal union type 'off' | 'debug' | 'diagnostic' for diagnostics verbosity.
